## Security Impact Assessment

**Does this PR contain any of the following?**
- [ ] Authentication/authorization changes
- [ ] Database queries or schema changes
- [ ] Cryptographic operations
- [ ] File upload/download logic
- [ ] External API calls
- [ ] User input handling

**If yes to any above, a security-focused reviewer is REQUIRED**

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I have run SonarQube locally with no HIGH severity issues
- [ ] I have added tests for security-relevant code paths
- [ ] I have NOT committed any secrets (passwords, keys, tokens)
- [ ] I have updated the threat model if architecture changed
